comment: Agentbox supplemental seccomp DENYLIST. This is intentionally allow-by-default (defaultAction SCMP_ACT_ALLOW): it is a thin supplemental layer that adds AF_ALG socket blocking (CVE-2026-31431 / 'Copy Fail') plus a set of high-risk syscalls on top of Docker's own default profile — it is NOT a replacement allowlist and is NOT a complete sandbox on its own. An allowlist was rejected deliberately: the workload surface (Chromium, CUDA, Godot) is too wide to enumerate safely without breakage. Combined with cap_drop:ALL, read_only root, uid 1000, and no-new-privileges:true, this denylist narrows the syscall surface while keeping the broad runtime working.

syscalls.comment: CVE-2026-31431: block AF_ALG (38) socket creation — algif_aead local privesc via splice()
Block highest-risk syscalls that legitimate container workloads never need
